entities.name: GRASSLANDS
entities.description: Ecosystems dominated by grasses experiencing land-cover change due to woody plant encroachment

entities.name: SAVANNAS
entities.description: Mixed woodland-grassland ecosystems experiencing land-cover change due to woody plant encroachment

entities.name: WOODY PLANT ENCROACHMENT
entities.description: The process of woody plants invading and increasing in cover within grasslands and savannas

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Carbon stored in the soil organic matter, which fluctuates based on land cover and precipitation

entities.name: SOIL NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen stored in the soil, which fluctuates based on land cover and precipitation

entities.name: MEAN ANNUAL PRECIPITATION
entities.description: The average yearly precipitation, used as a gradient to study soil carbon and nitrogen changes

entities.name: DELTA 13C
entities.description: Stable carbon isotope ratio used to quantify changes in carbon pools

entities.name: DELTA 15N
entities.description: Stable nitrogen isotope ratio used to quantify changes in nitrogen pools

entities.name: SOUTH AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study on woody plant encroachment was conducted

entities.name: NORTH AMERICA
entities.description: A geographic region used for comparison of precipitation threshold values

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Low precipitation areas where soil organic carbon increases due to woody plant encroachment

entities.name: HUMID REGIONS
entities.description: High precipitation areas where soil organic carbon decreases due to woody plant encroachment
